items.claim: Whitaker is giving up three inches in height to Krillov.
items.quote: Whitaker's giving up three inches in height.

items.claim: Whitaker will be stronger moving up in weight class.
Whitaker is coming off a 12-month layoff.
items.quote: this fight will almost be just shy of 12 months when it kicks off.

items.claim: Whitaker will have more speed than Krillov at light heavyweight.
items.quote: he'll have more speed than Krill I believe here in the light heavyweight division

items.claim: Terrence McKini has a 3-inch reach advantage over King Green.
Terrence McKini is a switch stance fighter.
King Green has a 72% takedown defense rate.
Terrence McKini has not been out of the first round in his last seven fights.
items.quote: this guy hasn't been out of the first round in man about seven fights.

items.claim: Terrence McKini will utilize takedowns and ground and pound to win.
items.quote: I think Terrence McKini is going to land takedowns at some point and utilize the ground and pound.
